age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Puri Wildlife Division Wildlife Veterinarian Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.puri.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Puri Wildlife Division Wildlife Veterinarian Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Puri Wildlife Division Wildlife Veterinarian post is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Wildlife Veterinarian post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Wildlife Veterinarian post is M.V.Sc or B.V.Sc & A.H. Candidates must possess these degrees to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Wildlife Veterinarian position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Wildlife Veterinarian post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Wildlife Veterinarian post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Wildlife Veterinarian post in the Puri Wildlife Division. This recruitment drive aims to fill this single position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Puri Wildlife Division Wildlife Veterinarian Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as per the instructions in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the selection criteria for the Wildlife Veterinarian role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Wildlife Veterinarian post will involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Puri Wildlife Division, which is www.puri.odisha.gov.in. Ensure you download the form from the correct source.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for Puri Wildlife Division?
faq.answer: The official website for Puri Wildlife Division is www.puri.odisha.gov.in. All relevant information and updates regarding this recruitment will be available here.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Wildlife Veterinarian position is contractual. This means the appointment will be for a fixed term as per the terms and conditions mentioned in the official notification.
